summary: Tested CV Analysis Persistence and Job Suggestions features. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified dashboard loads, CV section displays correctly, and navigation between tabs preserves state. The fixes address the bug where CV analysis results disappeared on navigation change.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/cv/latest-analysis returns {has_analysis: false} for new users
GET /api/cv/latest-analysis returns error for missing token
POST /api/cv/analyze-text returns job_id for valid CV text
POST /api/cv/analyze-text returns 400 for too short text
GET /api/cv/models returns empty models for new user
Full analysis flow: CV analysis completes with offres_emploi_suggerees in result, latest-analysis returns persisted result
frontend_ui_tests: CV upload input found with data-testid='cv-upload-input'
4 CV model cards displayed (classique, competences, fonctionnel, mixte)
Navigation back to Tableau de bord works

bug_fix_1_persistence.description: CV analysis results no longer disappear when changing tabs
bug_fix_1_persistence.implementation: New GET /api/cv/latest-analysis endpoint returns most recent completed analysis. Frontend CvAnalysisSection loads this on mount via useEffect.

bug_fix_2_job_suggestions.description: CV analysis now includes offres_emploi_suggerees (3-5 job suggestions)
bug_fix_2_job_suggestions.implementation: AI prompt updated to include offres_emploi_suggerees. Result dict includes the field.

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create anonymous tokens and submit CV text for analysis. The full flow test waits up to 120 seconds for AI analysis completion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CV analysis persistence feature fully tested. The GET /api/cv/latest-analysis endpoint returns the most recent completed analysis with has_analysis: true/false. The POST /api/cv/analyze-text endpoint starts a background job that includes offres_emploi_suggerees in the result. Frontend CvAnalysisSection loads previous analysis on mount (lines 543-564) and displays job suggestions with data-testid='cv-suggested-jobs'. Navigation between dashboard tabs preserves state due to the on-mount loading.
